meta.title: FundedYouth Changelog Feed
meta.description: Static data source for the FundedYouth changelog hub. Edit `apps` and `updates` below, then redeploy. Fetched by the app at runtime from /data/changelog.json.

apps.name: Public Site
apps.description: The face of FundedYouth. Program information, public blogs, and join page.

apps.name: User Portal
apps.description: Personal student/founder dashboards, member profiles, and gamified challenges.

apps.name: The Vault
apps.description: Exclusive digital drops, startup contract templates, and funding reserves telemetry.

apps.name: Docs
apps.description: Self-service knowledge bases, ecosystem API guidelines, and developer toolkits.

apps.name: Curriculum
apps.description: Startup builder guides, interactive masterclasses, and project submission steps.

apps.name: Partner Hub
apps.description: Investor matchmaking boards, sponsor deal catalogs, and internship match systems.

updates.title: ⚡ Rocket-Fast Secure Assets Delivery Engine (SADE) Live!
updates.description:
We've completely overhauled how startup boilerplate legal agreements and media kits are parsed and served.

### What is SADE?
SADE (Secure Assets Delivery Engine) utilizes edge caching and automated key rotation to make downloading templates instantaneous.

### Features
* **Zero-latency downloads**: Boilers load in under **45ms** globally.
* **Smart Watermarking**: Clean PDF watermarking with founder signatures embedded dynamically.
* **Vault Multi-Signatures**: Seed investment paperwork now supports co-founder parallel signing.

updates.title: 📚 Interactive Startup Builder Masterclass Launched
updates.description:
The highly requested Startup Builder track is officially live!

We worked directly with top venture studio partners to assemble **8 hyper-practical interactive lessons** to guide you from problem discovery to your first $10k in ARR.

### Core Modules Added:
1. **The Youth Edge**: Finding arbitrage opportunities as student builders.
2. **Landing Your First 10 Customers**: Tactical cold outreach playbooks.
3. **No-Code Backends**: Launching dynamic websites without writing custom database layers.
4. **The Cap Table Sim**: Interactive slider matching founder divisions.

*Complete all modules to unlock the **Cap-Table Wizard Badge** in your User Portal!*

updates.title: 🎨 Dark Mode Aesthetic & Interactive Achievements Grid
updates.description:
Your Member Profile page got a glow up! We've heard you loud and clear: builders want a dark midnight aesthetic to code in comfort during those 2 AM sessions.

### New Additions
* **Midnight Carbon Palette**: Soft, mathematically accurate contrast ratios for long-night builders.
* **Achievements Showcase Grid**: See your unlocked badges (including the new Cap-Table Wizard Badge!).
* **Live Venture Stats Widget**: Watch your FundedPoints accrue dynamically based on community engagement.

updates.title: 🔒 Security Hotfix - Safeguarding Newsletter Form Entrances
updates.description:
We identified and patched a minor vulnerability related to input sanitization on our public footer newsletter capture.

### Key Details
* **Vulnerability type**: Form rate-abuse and cross-site scripting risks during peak traffic times.
* **Resolution**: Added cryptographic Cloudflare Turnstile guards and complete server-side input stripping.
* **Impact**: Zero records were exposed; this is a preventative security hardening measure.

updates.title: 📖 Added 'Building with AI' SDK Reference Manual
updates.description:
Our developer docs now contain extensive recipes for integrating LLM features safely inside Sandbox environments.

### Contents:
* **LLM Hook Templates**: Plug-and-play code snippets for initializing your model client.
* **Usage Limits Monitor API**: Avoid running over developer quotas when sandbox prototyping.
* **Web-Safe Keys Guidelines**: Best practices for proxying API calls to prevent leakages.

updates.title: 🤝 High-School Startup Investor Board Launch (Beta)
updates.description:
We've soft-launched our specialized Venture Board! Eligible teen founders can now upload safe executive summaries to showcase to registered micro-VC funds.

### How it works:
1. Complete your pitch summary in the **User Portal**.
2. Push your summary directly to the **Partner Hub** and set tags like 'Fintech', 'AI', or 'SaaS'.
3. Registered, vet-checked investors can request introduction calls with high-potential FundedYouth projects.
